name: splunk-custom-viz
description: Create installable Splunk custom visualization apps from a short brand description. Make sure to use this skill whenever the user mentions building a Splunk custom viz, a custom visualization for Splunk, a themed Splunk dashboard app, or wants branded Canvas 2D vizs for Splunk — even if they don't explicitly say 'plugin'. HTML-first design workflow: produces a designer-grade HTML mockup that the user can preview, then ports it to ES5 Canvas Splunk vizs with light + dark theme support and both Classic AMD (.tar.gz) and Extension API (.spl) output. Four skills: cv-scope (gather context), cv-sketch (HTML mockup + DESIGN-LOCK.md), cv-create (port to Splunk code), cv-build (validate + package).
